text.tspan: DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice releases mdts v0.20.2 with mermaid bug fix, boosting docs clarity
JUST IN
@unhappychoice pushes 19 dependency PRs, trimming bundle size by 3 % in one week
ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@unhappychoice adds 5 Last.fm fetchers, adding 3,590 lines and 10 new files in a single commit
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice introduces Nushell support, now a first‑class shell in Splashboard
NOT A DRILL
@unhappychoice mashes through 70+ commits daily, peaking at 110 on Thursday
HISTORIC MERGE
@unhappychoice merges 13 mdts PRs, including a full release and 7 dependency upgrades
SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice’s PRs hit 384 commits, +26k lines added, -3k lines removed – a clean sweep
